emotional_tone: Objective, rigid, technical, reliable, command-center focus.

headings.strategy: Used for widget titles, page headers, KPI labels. Emphasizes authority.

body.strategy: Used for main readable content, descriptions, and standard UI elements.

data_mono.strategy: MANDATORY for all numerical values: currency pairs, prices, indicators (RSI, EMA), win/loss stats.

spacing_and_layout.grid_mode: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID

strategies.summary_widgets: col-span-1 (Single metric like Win Rate, Bot Status)
strategies.chart_or_grid: col-span-2 row-span-2 or col-span-3 (Main monitoring data/signals)
strategies.history_feed: col-span-1 row-span-2 (Tall narrow lists of recent Telegram signals)

spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align dense data. Center-align only single metric summary numbers.

surface_strategies.dashboard_cards: Grid Borders strategy. Flat background, 1px subtle border (border-[#ffffff]/10), no shadow. On hover, slight border color brighten (border-[#ffffff]/25). No heavy radiuses. Use rounded-md or rounded-sm max (4px to 6px) to keep the technical feel.
surface_strategies.header_nav: Solid background (bg-[#09090B]) with a hard bottom border (border-b border-[#ffffff]/10) to separate from the grid.
surface_strategies.active_signal: The Tracing Beam or glowing border approach. When a signal is generated, give the card a glowing 1px border matching the signal color (buy=green, sell=red).

components_instructions.charts: Use Recharts. Line or Area charts for prices. Monospace font for axes. Grid lines should be very faint (#ffffff/5).
components_instructions.tables: Shadcn UI Table. Striped rows (bg-[#121214] and bg-[#1A1A1D]). Monospace for numbers. Sticky header.
components_instructions.status_indicators: Small rounded full circles (h-2 w-2) with animate-pulse for active 'Running' status.
components_instructions.bot_control: Shadcn Switch/Toggle for Start/Stop bot. Prominent placement in header or main summary card.
components_instructions.icons: Use Phosphor Icons (dense, technical) or Lucide (default). Install Phosphor: `yarn add @phosphor-icons/react`
components_instructions.forms: For bot configuration (confidence %, martingale levels), use Shadcn Input, Select, Slider. Form fields must have labels.

motion.hover: Subtle border color change and text color brightening. No heavy translations.
motion.data_update: When new data arrives, flash the background color of the cell briefly (green for price up, red for price down) and fade back out.

images_and_media.usage: Use the background texture at very low opacity (e.g., 5%) fixed in the body background to break the pure solid dark grey, adding a subtle 'trading' feel.

testing.data_testid_convention: All interactive/key elements MUST use kebab-case `data-testid` (e.g., 'start-bot-button', 'signal-row-buy', 'win-rate-metric').

setup_instructions: Install fonts via Google Fonts in index.html or layout: Chivo, IBM Plex Sans, JetBrains Mono.
Configure Tailwind config colors to use the provided hex values.
Install date-fns for timezone (UTC-5 New York) formatting.
